slides.content:
Welcome to Strandveien 112

The building includes 7 rooms and 11 apartments.

Move-in / Move-out Procedure

All move-ins and move-outs must be arranged in advance with management. Keys must be handed over directly upon departure.

Parking

Do not block access for snow clearing in front of the entrance.

Electrical Waste Disposal

Free disposal at Elkjøp (between Elkjøp and the sea).

About Smoking

Smoking is not permitted directly outside the entrance. Do not leave cigarette waste at the front door. Cameras may be installed if necessary.

Important – Cooking & Fire Alarm

Always use the extractor fan when cooking. If the alarm is triggered without fire, call 110 immediately. Failure may result in a NOK 6,500 charge.
Creating a Safe and Respectful Living Environment This applies to both accommodation rigs and apartments.

Zero-tolerance policy

  • Bullying and harassment
  • Discrimination and racism
  • Gender-based violence
  • Violence and threats
  • Substance abuse

Respect for Each Other

  • Show consideration
  • Keep noise levels low
  • Clean up after yourself
  • Respect privacy
  • Be inclusive

Reporting and Support

  • Report issues to landlord
  • Contact HR or whistleblower
  • Employer is available for support
Together, we create a safe and positive place to live – built on respect, responsibility, and care.
